title: Squirrel Removal in Inwood, Manhattan | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Inwood, Manhattan. Humane extraction, exclusion & prevention. Serving Inwood Hill Park area. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Inwood's unique position at Manhattan's northern tip, with abundant tree coverage and proximity to Inwood Hill Park, creates ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive. When squirrels invade attics, walls, or commercial spaces in this vibrant neighborhood, Best Pest Control NYC provides humane and effective removal solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the specific challenges faced by Inwood residents in pre-war buildings and modern apartments alike.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Inwood homeowners and businesses for years with proven squirrel removal techniques tailored to Manhattan's northernmost neighborhood. Our team combines humane trapping methods with comprehensive exclusion work to ensure squirrels don't return, all while respecting Inwood's close-knit community and diverse architectural landscape.
localContext: From the historic buildings along Dyckman Street to the apartment complexes near Isham Park, Inwood's mix of pre-war construction and proximity to wooded areas makes it particularly susceptible to squirrel intrusions. The neighborhood's abundant mature trees and access to Inwood Hill Park's natural forest provide squirrels easy pathways to rooftops and attic spaces throughout the area.

faqs.question: Why is squirrel removal in Inwood more expensive than other pest control?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal costs $900–$2,500 in Inwood because it requires specialized skills including humane trapping, structural repairs, entry point exclusion, and often attic restoration. The process is more complex than typical pest control, especially in Inwood's older buildings where squirrels can create multiple entry points through deteriorated soffits and roof lines.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Inwood due to Inwood Hill Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, Inwood has one of Manhattan's highest squirrel populations due to its proximity to Inwood Hill Park's 196 acres of natural forest. The park provides ideal squirrel habitat, and these animals frequently move into nearby residential and commercial buildings seeking warm shelter, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Inwood homes?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Inwood take 3–7 days from initial trapping to complete exclusion work. The timeline depends on the size of the infestation, number of entry points, and accessibility in your specific building. Pre-war buildings common in Inwood may require additional time for thorough sealing of all potential entry points.

faqs.question: Will removed squirrels from Inwood return to my property?
faqs.answer: When Best Pest Control NYC completes professional exclusion work, removed squirrels cannot return. We seal all entry points with durable materials and install preventative barriers on vulnerable areas. Our comprehensive approach ensures your Inwood property remains squirrel-free long-term, with warranty coverage for added peace of mind.
